items.situation: two friends debating whether to buy concert tickets early or wait for last-minute deals

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Did you see the concert at the Riverside Arena got announced? I'm thinking of grabbing tickets tonight.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Already? The show isn't until June. Last-minute deals usually pop up the week before.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Yeah, but the good seats sell out fast. My cousin waited last time and ended up in the back row.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hmm, that's a good point. Maybe split the difference — buy now if presale opens, otherwise wait.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Smart. I'll set an alert and check Friday morning.

questions.stem: What are the speakers mainly discussing?

options.A: When to purchase tickets for the concert
options.B: Where to sit at the Riverside Arena
options.C: Whether to attend the concert in June
options.D: How to find discount tickets online

questions.explanation: 对话主要围绕“现在买票还是等到临场再买”展开，因此他们讨论的核心是何时购票。B 只是顺带提到“好座位会被抢光”，并非主要话题；C 他们都没质疑要不要去；D 也没有讨论网上折扣。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do on Friday morning?

options.A: Wait until late June to purchase her tickets
options.B: Travel to Riverside Arena to buy paper tickets
options.C: Check whether early presale tickets are available
options.D: Ask her cousin which seats to buy first

questions.explanation: 男生建议“presale 一开就买，否则再等”，女生回应“好主意，我周五早上看看”，所以她最可能在周五查看是否开了预售。A 是她原本想避免的“等等再买”；B 没有讨论亲自去现场；D 她只是提到表姐的经历，没说要请教她。

items.situation: two students discussing a new restaurant downtown and which dish to try

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Have you tried that new place, Maple Spoon, downtown yet?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Not yet. I heard the noodle bowls are amazing but the line at lunch is brutal.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Skip the lunch rush. Go around three in the afternoon. I had the spicy peanut noodles and they were unreal — best meal I've had all month.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sold. Was anything overpriced or just kind of average?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Honestly, the desserts. They look pretty but taste flat. Get the noodles, then grab coffee somewhere else.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Good tip. I'll head over this Sunday.

questions.stem: Which dish does the woman recommend?

options.A: The mushroom dumplings on the appetizer menu
options.B: The spicy peanut noodles she ordered there
options.C: The seasonal dessert with a maple sauce
options.D: The grilled fish bowl with brown rice

questions.explanation: 女生明确说她点的“spicy peanut noodles”是这个月最好的一餐，所以推荐这道菜。A、D 完全没提及；C 与对话相反，她说甜点中看不中吃。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the woman's overall opinion of Maple Spoon?

options.A: She thinks the restaurant is overpriced and rarely worth visiting
options.B: She believes the lunch hour is the best time to dine there
options.C: She regrets recommending the place to her classmate
options.D: She considers the main dishes better than the desserts

questions.explanation: 她大力推荐面条但批评甜点“taste flat”，因此她认为主菜比甜点好。A 她只批评甜点，不是整家店；B 她建议避开午餐高峰；C 她主动推荐并未表现后悔。

items.situation: two students at the rec center talking about a free intro yoga class

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hey, did you sign up for that free intro yoga class at the rec center yet?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I tried this morning, but the website said the session was full.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Really? They added a second slot on Thursday at 7:00 PM. Check again.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, nice. Do I need to bring my own mat?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, no rentals this time. There's a sign-up form at the front desk too if the website acts up.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Perfect. I'll swing by after my chem lab.

questions.stem: What does the man tell the woman about Thursday?

options.A: A new yoga instructor will lead the class
options.B: A registration fee was added that morning
options.C: A second class session was opened that day
options.D: A mat rental program was launched recently

questions.explanation: 男生说“他们周四晚上 7:00 加了第二场”，所以那天新开了一节课。A、B、D 在对话中均未出现。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Visit the rec center after her chemistry lab
options.B: Buy a yoga mat at the campus bookstore
options.C: Email the front desk to request a refund
options.D: Wait until the morning session reopens

questions.explanation: 女生最后说“化学实验课后我顺路过去”，且男生提到前台也能报名，所以她最可能化学课后去 rec center 报名。B 她从未说要新买垫子；C 没有退款话题；D 上午的课她说不上。
